articles.title: Report: Celtics are ‘known to be interested’ in trading for Giannis Antetokounmpo

articles.title: 5 takeaways as Red Sox pull away from Brewers, 5-0, to earn first series win

They have a long way to go but are starting to resemble the team many believed they could be.

summary: Red Sox defeated Brewers 5-0, marking their first series win of the season.

Fans are hopeful as the team begins to show potential for a successful season.

articles.title: Wu releases $4.9 billion budget proposal amid ‘difficult moment’ for city’s finances
articles.description:
The proposal would increase spending by just 2.1 percent, the smallest year-over-year increase the city has proposed since 2009.

The post Wu releases $4.9 billion budget proposal amid ‘difficult moment’ for city’s finances appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mayor Wu proposes a $4.9 billion budget for Boston amid financial challenges.
Spending increase is only 2.1%, the smallest since 2009.
Residents may face limited city services due to tight financial constraints.

articles.title: Sen. Markey, local clergy call for end to Iran war and Trump’s time in office
articles.description:
“This is Trump’s war of choice,” said Markey. “Only diplomacy can bring lasting peace.”

summary: Sen. Ed Markey and local clergy demand an end to the Iran war.

Local residents may face increased diplomatic tensions and impacts on community resources.
